results.description: Tom Holland is staying at The Taj Mahal Palace, Mumbai.

results.title: DTU Launches New Integrated Programmes in Data Science, Applied Statistics; Partners With University of Houston
results.description: DTU has launched integrated BSc-MSc programmes in Data Science and Applied Statistics for 2026-27. Admissions will be through CUET UG, with separate DTU registration required.

results.title: NGT expands uranium contamination case to Delhi, issues notice to DPCC, Delhi govt over groundwater quality concerns
results.description: NGT expands uranium contamination case to Delhi, issues notice to DPCC and Delhi govt after report shows 13-15% groundwater samples exceed uranium limits.
